message:
feat(fwc): add connector metadata gap audit and readiness matrix (83 connectors)

Audits all 83 connectors against the FWC readiness contract and produces
a machine-readable inventory classifying each by readiness tier:
- Tier 1 (Ready): 26 connectors with full manifest + Rust introspection
- Tier 2 (Manifest-only): 50 connectors with complete manifests but
  degraded Rust operations_info() (missing input_schema/output_schema/AgentHint)
- Tier 3 (No manifest): 3 connectors (postgresql, redis, whisper)
- Tier 4 (Structural): 4 connectors with misc issues

Primary finding: 64% of connectors use raw JSON operations_info() that omits
schemas and agent hints from runtime introspection. Manifest data exists but
is not surfaced. Remediation is mechanical (migrate to typed OperationInfo).

Includes cohort-based remediation plan (C1-C6) prioritized by impact.

Closes bead: 1g7z0.12

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
